ActorFrame.children: <Layer File="_GlitchSounds.xml" OnCommand="queuecommand,Pulse" PulseCommand="%function(self) ModPulse(self,'randomvanish') end" ModCommand="%function(self) if world < 6 then warp = math.mod(warp + 1,4) elseif world == 6 then warp = math.mod(warp + 1 + ((warp == 1 and 1) or 0),4); else warp = 0 end if warp == 1 then Sound('chapterend.ogg') elseif warp == 2 then Sound('WarpZone.ogg') elseif warp == 3 then self:queuecommand('Glitch') else Sound('dundundun') end end" />
